faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Uniondale typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What attracts crickets to Uniondale homes?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and light. In Uniondale, they commonly enter homes through cracks in foundations, gaps around windows and doors, and basement entry points. They're drawn to damp basements, crawl spaces, and areas with standing water, which are common in Long Island properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations can be controlled within 1-2 treatments. You'll typically notice a significant reduction in cricket activity within 24-48 hours of the initial treatment. We offer follow-up services to ensure complete elimination and provide preventative measures to keep crickets from returning.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety by using EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques. Our treatments are safe for homes with children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and re-entry times after treatment.
